characters.name: Alrick Timmens
characters.description: Alrick TimmensCharacteristicsSpeciesHumanGenderMaleAgeLate 20s – Early 30sHair ColorLight BlondeEye ColorCeruleanPersonal InformationStatusDeceasedResidenceUnited KingdomRelativesAmelia Hughes(fiancée)OccupationEngineerProduction InformationBookBook OneFirst Appearance"The Past Car"Latest Appearance"The Past Car"Voiced ByMatthew RhysLena Headey(briefly, "The Past Car") Alrick Timmens[1]was a human who was engaged toAmelia Hughesprior to his death. He and Amelia attended the same engineering school in theUnited Kingdom. His sudden death caused Amelia much grief and led to her boarding theInfinity Train, taking over the train whenOne-Onerefused to make a car about him, trying for over 30 years to recreate him and the life she wanted to leave. Alrick's life inspired the creation of theUnfinished Car, theTurtle Emperorof said car, and a six year old girl namedHazel. In his school years, Alrick befriended a girl namedAmelia Hughes. In his college years, he moved to theUnited Statesand majored in programming.[2]

characters.name: Ballerina Kids
characters.description: Ballerina KidsNameAliasesShaynaChloeTwo Unnamed GirlsPersonal InformationEnemiesGrace Monroe(present attitude unknown)Production InformationFirst Appearance"The Debutante Ball Car" (mentioned)Latest Appearance"The Origami Car" (flashback) TheBallerina Kidsare a group of girls that appear inGrace Monroe'smemory tape. They are remembered as the group who did not invite Grace for ice cream. Only two of them have known names,ShaynaandChloe. Shayna is a girl of African decent. Like Grace, Shayna's hair is also tied into a bun but is differentiated by her window's peak. Chloe is the brunette with a short ponytail and a necklace sitting on the right. One of the girls, has her long blonde hair tied into a ponytail and freckles while the other, has her black hair styled in a bob cut.

characters.name: Building Man
characters.description: Building PersonCharacteristicsRaceBuilding PeopleGenderMalePersonal StatusStatusAliveMediaFirst Appearance"The Kaiju Car"Voice ActorJustin Michael TheBuilding Manis a native of theKaiju Car. As aBuilding Person, he ignores a lot of obvious dangers due to his terrible peripheral vision. When his car is being destroyed by theKaiju Monsters, he is seen panicking. When he encounter's One-One, he attempts to warn One-One of the obviously dangerous Kaiju Monsters to no success.

characters.name: Carrot People
characters.description: Carrot PeoplePhysical CharacteristicsEye ColorHollowComplexionOrangeCarrot Shaped HeadHair ColorGreenGeneral CharacteristicsLocationCarrot CarProduction InformationFirst Appearance"The Black Market Car"Latest Appearance"The Black Market Car" TheCarrot Peopleare a species of humanoid carrot beings from theCarrot Car. The Carrot People are about half the height of humans and wear more rural attire, suggesting a culture of agriculture. They all have a carrot-shaped head, orange skin color, and two hollow that are their eyes.

characters.description: ChandelierDecorative FormEscort FormCharacteristicsSpeciesDenizen (Chandelier)GenderMaleEye ColorWhiteComplexionGoldPersonal InformationStatusAliveResidenceDebutante Ball CarFriendsOctopus PeopleProduction InformationVoiced ByAlfred Molina Chandelieris adenizenof theInfinity Trainand resident of TheDebutante Ball Car. He appears in theseason 3episode"The Debutante Ball Car"as the guide for passengers who need to master their ballroom's dance. Chandelier has a simple face with white oval eyes. He looks to be a typical ballroom chandelier with sparkly gems, lots of candles and two chandelier arms.

characters.description: Concession Stand MonsterAppearanceAccessoriesHidden in car itselfPersonal StatusStatusAliveFriend(s)Popcorn GirlSoda GirlCandy GirlNacho GirlMediaFirst Appearance"The Movie Theater Car" TheConcession Stand Monsteris a creature that live in theMovie Theater Cartaking the form of a Concession Stand. It hasConcession Peoplesinging a song that distract anyone in the cart, then comes to life and attempts to eat anyone who gets too close to it. Based on the song the Concession People sing it is possible that once it devours its victim they transform into a Concession Person.

characters.name: Corginian Corgis
characters.description: Corginian CorgisGeneral CharacteristicsLocationCorginiaLeaderAtticusAlliesTulip OlsenOne-OneTurtle PeopleUgly IrwinEnemiesStewardProduction InformationBookBook OneBook ThreeFirst Appearance"The Corgi Car"Latest Appearance"The Musical Car" I must warn you, however, we corgis are proud people, and we hate being picked up. Corginian Corgisare a sentient species native to theCorgi Car. These small herding dogs are distinguished by two types, the Cardigan Welsh and Pembroke Welsh. These two breeds were at war untilAtticusunited them and became ruler of Corginia.

characters.name: Cross-Eyed Ducks
characters.description: Cross-Eyed DucksPhysical CharacteristicsComplexionWhite FeathersTraitsCrossed EyesGeneral CharacteristicsLocationCross-Eyed Ducks CarProduction InformationBookBook OneFirst Appearance"The Corgi Car"Latest Appearance"The Cross-Eyed Ducks Car" Cross-Eyed Ducksare talking ducks with off-centered eyes. These ducks are pilled up against each other in theCross-Eyed Ducks Carmaking up most of what is visible in the car. One duck actually requests that someone help him find his normal eyes, implying that the crossed eyes are not their regular eyes. They are voiced byOwen Dennis.

characters.name: Cubey Denizens
characters.description: Cubey DenizensPhysical CharacteristicsComplexionGreyTraitsRocksGeneral CharacteristicsLocationHey Ho Whoa CarProduction InformationFirst Appearance"The Lucky Cat Car" (mentioned)"The Hey Ho Whoa Car"Latest Appearance"The Party Car" TheCubey Denizensare a group of rock-shapeddenizenswho occupy theHey Ho Whoa Car. The denizens, who are all rocks, don't seem to do much except say "Hey," "Ho," and "Whoa!" when falling (or perhaps thrown), even when they are asleep. It seems their only role in the car is to fill the massive crevasse dividing the two doors.

characters.name: Denizens
characters.description: ADenizenis the technical name given to any of the inhabitants of theInfinity Train. They take residence on the Infinity Train and in its countless train cars with interior worlds. Denizens can vary in every form and shape raging from anthropomorphic animals to animated objects and different kinds of lifeforms. They are distinguished frompassengersby not having their ownnumbers. Denizens have the innate desire to help all of those who came across them. Under normal circumstances, Denizens will always help or try to make any passenger feel better. However, some Denizens may behave in an unhelpful or even hostile manner toward passengers.
